name: @harness/cost-meter
description: ISSUE-074 — the C7 cost meter (FR-7.COST.001–004 / NFR-COST.001/004/005/006/010). The token→$ estimate-grade estimator (all vendors, fail-safe rounded up, cost_unknown sentinel never a silent 0), per-task-type aggregation from the first task, the running per-deployment daily/weekly spend meter, and the four-rung cost ladder (soft→alert, throttle/kill→C6 breach signal). Metering + signalling ONLY: C7 meters, C6 decides, C5 executes. Reads event_log/task_queue/config_values (price_table + cost_ladder_* keys owned by ISSUE-010/011); writes a cost_threshold_breach notifications row on the soft rung. Port + in-memory fake reference model; supabase-store.ts is the live pg adapter authored to the DDL — NOT run live (the live proof is owed to the Stage-3 checkpoint).
